creator: phk@phk.freebsd.dk
text:
In message <auto-000005660089@relay2.tomsk.ru>, Victor Sudakov writes:

>>Description:
>Adding NO_TOOLCHAIN=true to /etc/make.conf breaks buildworld if
>/usr/src is mounted readonly.

NO_TOOLCHAIN can only be used during installworld.


--

phk@FreeBSD.ORG         | TCP/IP since RFC 956
FreeBSD committer       | BSD since 4.3-tahoe    
Never attribute to malice what can adequately be explained by incompetence.
